source.displayCitation: Nebraska Department of Revenue, Property Assessment Division forms and homestead exemption pages
source.notes: Outbound links point to official Nebraska Department of Revenue/PAD pages or PDFs. The site does not prepare, prefill, submit, or store these forms.

forms.title: Nebraska Homestead Exemption Application
forms.note: Use the official application and confirm eligibility, required schedules, and filing instructions with the county assessor.

forms.title: Income Statement and Instructions
forms.note: Use when required by the homestead instructions; some homestead categories do not file this schedule.

forms.title: Property Valuation Protest
forms.note: Use the official protest form and confirm local filing requirements, deadline, signature, and requested-valuation details.

forms.title: Report of Damaged Real Property
forms.note: For significant real-property damage; confirm timing, supporting documents, and where to file.

forms.title: Special Valuation Application for Agricultural or Horticultural Land
forms.note: For qualifying agricultural or horticultural land; review official eligibility and filing instructions.
